title: Where an employer has given notice to an employee to terminate
content:
his contract of employment and before that notice expires the 
employee dies, Part VIA of this Ordinance on employment 
protection shall apply as if the contract had been terminated by the 
employer by notice expiring on the date of the employee’s death.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
